experience.description: Collected and recorded biological and operational data of aquaculture treatments. Maintained safety and compliance records, serving as vessel Safety Representative. Analyzed treatment efficacy and prepared professional reports for management.
Logged daily operations data for production planning and compliance tracking. Operated boats, forklifts, and machinery while ensuring inventory accuracy.

experience.company: National Council for Air and Stream Improvement (NCASI)
experience.description: Collected data and flora-samples for natural resource management of Boreal Forest. Lived remote in Northern Ontario, maintaining quality of records and bioassay samples.
